generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong domestic security. The recent attacks show we can't afford to be soft on threats. Some say we're giving up liberties, but look at the facts: communities with better coordinated local security teams report 30% fewer incidents. It's not about control - it's about giving our first responders the tools they need to keep us safe. #CommunityFirst #SecurityMatters
